content:
*“睡呀睡，海的小宝贝。”
“你的摇篮是黑色的月亮，把群星吞进梦乡……”*

✦ 诞妄·墨菲 CV：能登麻美子
✦ 守密人可以在Wallpaper Engine中应用诞妄·墨菲主题动态壁纸：https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3610047101

🎁**评论有奖：**
✦ 评论本条视频，即可参与抽奖，截止时间2025/12/8  23:59。
✦ 我们将从评论中选取 5 位守密人赠送**「秘银日冕」系列徽章 盲盒**×1。
✦ 前往官方 X 有机会获得**「能登麻美子 亲笔签名」**：https://x.com/MorimensOfcl/status/1992109362459128264?s=19 
✦ 中奖名单将在转发活动结束后72小时内公布，届时请留意官方动态和私信消息。

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

*"Hush now, hush, my seaborne dear."
"The Black Moon holds your cradle near; 
swallow the stars in your dream's mere…"   *

✦ Murphy: Fauxborn VA: Noto Mamiko
✦ Keepers can apply the "Murphy: Fauxborn" themed animated wallpaper in Wallpaper Engine：https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3610047101

🎁 **Giveaway: **
✦ How to Enter: Comment under this post. Entry Deadline <t:1765209599:F>
✦ Prize:  5 Keepers to receive a **"Silver Corona"** Series Badge Blind Box.
✦ Go to the official X account and have a chance to obtain **an Autograph from Noto Mamiko**：https://x.com/MorimensOfcl/status/1992109362459128264?s=19 
✦ Winners will be announced within 72 hours after the deadline. Please stay tuned to further annoucements and DMs from the official account.


📹 中文：https://youtu.be/FE1S6a6GPwc
📹 English：https://youtu.be/5rmkXTIDAfc
